name: Failed Drives Detected
description: Detects drives in a failed state. Failed drives reduce RAID protection and must be replaced to prevent data loss.
check_query: SELECT system_id, status, media_type, capacity_bytes FROM es_drives WHERE system_id = ? AND status = 'failed'
remediation_template: Drive ({{media_type}}, {{capacity_bytes}} bytes) is in '{{status}}' state. Replace the failed drive immediately. The controller will automatically reconstruct data if hot spares are available.

name: Degraded Drives Detected
description: Detects drives in a degraded or non-optimal state that may be approaching failure.
check_query: SELECT system_id, status, media_type, capacity_bytes FROM es_drives WHERE system_id = ? AND status NOT IN ('optimal', 'online') AND status != 'failed'
remediation_template: Drive ({{media_type}}) is in '{{status}}' state. Monitor the drive closely and plan proactive replacement to prevent unexpected failure.

name: Storage Pool Capacity Warning
description: Detects storage pools with used capacity between 85% and 95%.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, status, CAST(used_capacity_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(total_capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 AS used_pct, raid_level FROM es_pools WHERE system_id = ? AND CAST(used_capacity_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(total_capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 > 85 AND CAST(used_capacity_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(total_capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 <= 95
remediation_template: Storage pool '{{name}}' (RAID {{raid_level}}) is at {{used_pct | round(1)}}% capacity. Add drives to expand the pool or create additional volumes on other pools.

name: Storage Pool Capacity Critical
description: Detects storage pools with used capacity exceeding 95%. Critically full pools can cause write failures.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, status, CAST(used_capacity_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(total_capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 AS used_pct, raid_level FROM es_pools WHERE system_id = ? AND CAST(used_capacity_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(total_capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 > 95
remediation_template: Storage pool '{{name}}' (RAID {{raid_level}}) is critically full at {{used_pct | round(1)}}% capacity. Immediately expand the pool or migrate workloads to prevent write failures.

name: Storage Pool Degraded
description: Detects storage pools that are not in an optimal state. A degraded pool has lost redundancy due to a drive failure.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, status, raid_level FROM es_pools WHERE system_id = ? AND status != 'optimal'
remediation_template: Storage pool '{{name}}' (RAID {{raid_level}}) is in '{{status}}' state. Replace failed drives to restore RAID protection and initiate reconstruction.

name: Controller Offline
description: Detects controllers that are not in an optimal status. A failed controller reduces redundancy and may impact I/O performance.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, status, firmware_version FROM es_controllers WHERE system_id = ? AND status != 'optimal'
remediation_template: Controller '{{name}}' is in '{{status}}' state (firmware: {{firmware_version}}). Check controller health, connectivity, and power. Replace the controller if it has failed.

name: Critical MEL Events
description: Detects critical-priority events in the Major Event Log (MEL) from the last 24 hours that require immediate action.
check_query: SELECT system_id, event_type, priority, time_stamp, description FROM es_mel_events WHERE system_id = ? AND priority = 'critical' AND time_stamp >= datetime('now', '-24 hours')
remediation_template: Critical MEL event '{{event_type}}': {{description}} (at {{time_stamp}}). Investigate and resolve the underlying issue. Check SANtricity System Manager for details.

name: Warning MEL Events
description: Detects warning-priority events in the Major Event Log (MEL) from the last 24 hours.
check_query: SELECT system_id, event_type, priority, time_stamp, description FROM es_mel_events WHERE system_id = ? AND priority = 'warning' AND time_stamp >= datetime('now', '-24 hours')
remediation_template: Warning MEL event '{{event_type}}': {{description}} (at {{time_stamp}}). Review the event and plan corrective action to prevent escalation.

name: Array Needs Attention
description: Detects E-Series arrays flagged as needing attention. This indicates one or more components require operator intervention.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, firmware_version, status FROM es_arrays WHERE system_id = ? AND needs_attention = 1
remediation_template: Array '{{name}}' (firmware: {{firmware_version}}, status: {{status}}) needs attention. Open SANtricity System Manager to review and resolve the reported issues.

name: Array Status Not Optimal
description: Detects E-Series arrays whose overall status is not optimal, indicating degraded or failed components.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, firmware_version, status FROM es_arrays WHERE system_id = ? AND status != 'optimal'
remediation_template: Array '{{name}}' status is '{{status}}'. Use SANtricity System Manager Recovery Guru to diagnose and resolve component issues.

name: Volume Status Not Optimal
description: Detects E-Series volumes that are not in an optimal state. Non-optimal volumes may have degraded performance or be at risk of data loss.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, status FROM es_volumes WHERE system_id = ? AND status != 'optimal'
remediation_template: Volume '{{name}}' is in '{{status}}' state. Investigate the underlying pool and drive health. Resolve drive failures to restore volume to optimal state.

name: Mirror Not Synchronized
description: Detects asynchronous or synchronous mirror pairs that are not in a synchronized or optimal state.
check_query: SELECT system_id, state, sync_completion_pct FROM es_mirrors WHERE system_id = ? AND state NOT IN ('optimal', 'synchronized')
remediation_template: Mirror is in '{{state}}' state (sync: {{sync_completion_pct}}%). Check the mirror relationship, network connectivity between arrays, and resolve any blocking issues.

name: Mirror Synchronization Stalled
description: Detects mirror relationships where synchronization appears stalled (not completed and below 50%).
check_query: SELECT system_id, state, sync_completion_pct FROM es_mirrors WHERE system_id = ? AND state != 'optimal' AND sync_completion_pct < 50
remediation_template: Mirror synchronization is stalled at {{sync_completion_pct}}% (state: {{state}}). Check inter-array connectivity, bandwidth, and the health of both primary and secondary arrays.

name: SSD Cache Not Optimal
description: Detects SSD cache configurations that are not in an optimal state, which may degrade read performance.
check_query: SELECT system_id, status FROM es_ssd_cache WHERE system_id = ? AND status != 'optimal'
remediation_template: SSD cache is in '{{status}}' state. Check SSD drive health and replace any failed SSD cache drives to restore read cache performance.

name: Controller Firmware Mismatch
description: Detects dual-controller arrays where the controllers are running different firmware versions, indicating an incomplete firmware upgrade.
check_query: SELECT a.system_id, a.name AS ctrl_a_name, a.firmware_version AS ctrl_a_fw, b.name AS ctrl_b_name, b.firmware_version AS ctrl_b_fw FROM es_controllers a JOIN es_controllers b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.name < b.name WHERE a.system_id = ? AND a.firmware_version != b.firmware_version
remediation_template: Controllers '{{ctrl_a_name}}' ({{ctrl_a_fw}}) and '{{ctrl_b_name}}' ({{ctrl_b_fw}}) have mismatched firmware. Complete the firmware upgrade to ensure consistent behavior.

name: Low Spare Drive Count
description: Checks for arrays with fewer than 1 unassigned/spare drive. Without spares, a drive failure cannot be automatically reconstructed.
check_query: SELECT system_id, COUNT(*) AS spare_count FROM es_drives WHERE system_id = ? AND status = 'unassigned' GROUP BY system_id HAVING spare_count < 1
remediation_template: Only {{spare_count}} spare drive(s) available. Add hot spare drives to enable automatic reconstruction in case of drive failure.
